summary_en: 1,039,300 shares acquired cumulatively (2.47% of shares outstanding) for ¥1,500M via open-market purchase on TSE; authorization period 1 April–24 June 2026; final block of 649,400 shares for ¥865.6M executed 1–22 May 2026; program concluded.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Stock Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Kawada Technologies completed its treasury stock acquisition authorized by the board on 13 February 2026 under Company Law Article 156 (as applied via Article 165(3)). The program ran from 1 April through 24 June 2026 with an upper limit of 1,290,000 shares (2.47% of shares outstanding, adjusted upward from 430,000 shares due to a 3-for-1 stock split effective 1 April 2026) and ¥1,500 million in aggregate consideration. Cumulative acquisition totalled 1,039,300 shares for ¥1,499,980,091. The final block of 649,400 shares costing ¥865,591,902 was purchased during 1–22 May 2026 via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange regular session, bringing the overall program to completion.
